title: Christmas Glitter Wired Mesh Ribbon Sparkle for Holiday Gift Wrapping, Wreath Bow Making,DIY Crafts, Xmas Tree, Wedding Decorations, 6.3cm x 10Yards (Red)
features: FESTIVE GLITTER & SPARKLE DESIGN : Add dazzling holiday charm to gifts, trees, and crafts with our 6.3cm x 10-yard wired mesh ribbon! The glitter-infused, wire-edged design holds its shape perfectly for bows, wreaths, and DIY decor. Ideal for Christmas, weddings, and festive celebrations.

PREMIUM QUALITY & LONG-LASTING MATERIAL : Made from high-strength polyester mesh with a reinforced wire border, this ribbon resists fraying and holds curls securely. The rich glitter finish won’t shed, ensuring a mess-free, long-lasting sparkle.

EXTRA-WIDE & GENEROUS LENGTH ：At 6.3cm (2.5 inches) wide and 10 yards long, this ribbon provides ample material for multiple projects. Bulk-friendly for crafters, florists, and event planners—decorate entire trees or wrap dozens of gifts with one roll!

EASY TO USE & REUSABLE :The lightweight, flexible wire makes shaping effortless, while the wrinkle-resistant mesh stays flawless. Store and reuse for future holidays—perfect for DIYers, professional decorators, and last-minute decor!

VERSATILE HOLIDAY DECOR & GIFT WRAPPING ：Perfect for Christmas tree decorating, gift wrapping, wreath-making, and bow making! The flexible wired edge allows easy shaping into loops, curls, or lavish bows. Use for stockings, garlands, centerpieces, or wedding décor—endless creative possibilities!
description: Transform your holiday decorating and gift wrapping with this stunning glitter and sparkle wired mesh ribbon. Measuring 6.3 centimetres wide and an impressive 10 yards (9.1 metres) in length, this versatile ribbon adds a magical touch to your Christmas tree, wreaths, and presents. The diamond-patterned velvet material with glitter accents creates an enchanting sparkle that catches the light beautifully. The wired edges make it easy to shape and maintain perfect bows and decorative elements. Perfect for DIY crafts and wedding decorations, this ribbon's durability and flexibility allow for endless creative possibilities. The rich texture and elegant design make it an essential addition to your holiday decorating supplies. At just 80 grams, this lightweight yet sturdy ribbon is easy to work with and store. Whether you're creating festive wreaths, trimming your Christmas tree, or adding the perfect finishing touch to wrapped gifts, this ribbon delivers professional-looking results every time.
